pages.text: $(o)"The god does not descend, but the god's shadow can."$()$(br2)Activated only three times in recorded history. The craters — perfect circles, deep into bedrock — still remain.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)20 blocks$():$(br)· All $(l)non-player$() entities take $(l)50 magic damage$() (Bosses: $(l)25$())$(br)· Knocked back $(l)3 blocks$() outward and upward$(br2)Cost: $(l)12000$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Endgame nuke. 50 damage clears almost any unit; even Bosses feel it.$(br2)Player is safe but watch for knock-back hostiles landing in lava.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 5 Primordial$() — only Primordial cores can buffer the recoil.
